details.test: Task 1: Save 10-min high-rated scrambled egg recipe for 2 and build shopping list
Task 2: Schedule two vegetarian egg breakfasts under 400 calories for the same Saturday
Task 3: Bookmark dairy-free mushroom & spinach omelette and start timer
Task 4: Buy cheapest 8–10 inch non-stick pan under $35 with 4+ stars
Task 5: Save a recipe scaled to 3 servings using servings control
Task 6: Find quick kid-friendly egg recipe with <=5 ingredients and derive share link
Task 7: Generate shopping list excluding pantry staples (salt, pepper, olive oil)
Task 8: Submit 5-star review with detailed comment for an egg recipe
Task 9: Plan a low-sugar egg-based dessert on Sunday
